Free

You said:

Build your personal resume. Only using HTML Requirement: - Use semantic tags Include: - Headr with your name and photo - about me - education - skills - projects - hobbies - contact inforations - footer - atlease one list - use clickable links - external links (linkedin and github) - Mandatory tags ( header, footer, ui, li, ol, section, article, summary, details, figcaption, aside, nav, input, form, button, hgroup, table, img) - Avoid div and spans completely

ChatGPT said:

Below is a complete single-file HTML resume that satisfies the assignment constraints:

  • Only HTML

  • Semantic tags

  • Includes all required sections

  • Uses no div and no span

  • Includes the mandatory tags:
    header, footer, ul, li, ol, section, article, summary, details, figcaption, aside, nav, input, form, button, hgroup, table, img

You can copy this into a file like resume.html.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Tanmay Gaira - Resume</title>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- Header -->
    <header>
        <hgroup>
            <h1>Tanmay Gaira</h1>
            <h2>Web Developer | Graphics Designer | Freelance Photographer</h2>
        </hgroup>

        <figure>
            <img src="tanmay-photo.jpg" alt="Photo of Tanmay Gaira" width="180">
            <figcaption>Tanmay Gaira - Personal Resume Photo</figcaption>
        </figure>

        <nav>
            <ul>
                <li><a href="#about">About Me</a></li>
                <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
                <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
                <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
                <li><a href="#hobbies">Hobbies</a></li>
                <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
        </nav>
    </header>

    <main>

        <!-- About Me -->
        <section id="about">
            <h2>About Me</h2>
            <article>
                <p>
                    I am Tanmay Gaira, a BCA student and a passionate web developer, graphics designer,
                    freelance photographer, and editor. I enjoy learning new technologies, building useful
                    projects, and improving my creative and technical skills. My interests include web development,
                    design, video editing, and content creation.
                </p>
            </article>
        </section>

        <!-- Education -->
        <section id="education">
            <h2>Education</h2>

            <table border="1" cellpadding="8">
                <caption>Educational Qualifications</caption>
                <tr>
                    <th>Qualification</th>
                    <th>Institution</th>
                    <th>Year</th>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td>BCA</td>
                    <td>Amrapali University</td>
                    <td>Pursuing</td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <td>Intermediate</td>
                    <td>Inter College Kameri Devi</td>
                    <td>2024</td>
                </tr>
            </table>
        </section>

        <!-- Skills -->
        <section id="skills">
            <h2>Skills</h2>

            <article>
                <h3>Technical Skills</h3>
                <ul>
                    <li>HTML</li>
                    <li>C Programming</li>
                    <li>C++ Basics</li>
                    <li>Web Development</li>
                    <li>Adobe Lightroom</li>
                    <li>Canva</li>
                    <li>Video Editing</li>
                    <li>Graphics Designing</li>
                </ul>
            </article>

            <article>
                <h3>Other Skills</h3>
                <ol>
                    <li>Communication</li>
                    <li>Content Creation</li>
                    <li>Freelance Photography</li>
                    <li>Creative Editing</li>
                    <li>Quick Learning Ability</li>
                </ol>
            </article>
        </section>

        <!-- Projects -->
        <section id="projects">
            <h2>Projects</h2>

            <article>
                <h3>Portfolio Website</h3>
                <p>
                    Created a personal portfolio website using HTML and CSS to showcase my profile,
                    skills, and work samples.
                </p>
            </article>

            <article>
                <h3>CGPA Calculator</h3>
                <p>
                    Developed a CGPA calculator to help college students easily calculate their grades.
                </p>
            </article>

            <article>
                <h3>Rentify</h3>
                <p>
                    Planned a room and rental business website project named <strong>Rentify</strong>
                    for property and room listing services.
                </p>
            </article>

            <details>
                <summary>More Project Information</summary>
                <p>
                    I am also interested in building coding-related content, educational tools,
                    and practical web projects for students and businesses.
                </p>
            </details>
        </section>

        <!-- Hobbies -->
        <section id="hobbies">
            <h2>Hobbies</h2>
            <ul>
                <li>Photography</li>
                <li>Video Editing</li>
                <li>Learning New Technologies</li>
                <li>Exploring Creative Design Ideas</li>
                <li>Watching educational and coding content</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <!-- Aside -->
        <aside>
            <h2>Career Objective</h2>
            <p>
                My goal is to become a skilled software and web professional while also growing in
                creative fields like design, editing, and digital content creation.
            </p>
        </aside>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <section id="contact">
            <h2>Contact Information</h2>

            <article>
                <p><strong>Phone:</strong> <a href="tel:7217796730">7217796730</a></p>
                <p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:tanmaygaira911@gmail.com">tanmaygaira911@gmail.com</a></p>
                <p><strong>LinkedIn:</strong> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank">Visit LinkedIn</a></p>
                <p><strong>GitHub:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/" target="_blank">Visit GitHub</a></p>
            </article>

            <!-- Contact Form -->
            <section>
                <h3>Quick Contact Form</h3>
                <form>
                    <p>
                        <label for="fullname">Full Name:</label><br>
                        <input type="text" id="fullname" name="fullname" placeholder="Enter your name">
                    </p>

                    <p>
                        <label for="email">Email:</label><br>
                        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="Enter your email">
                    </p>

                    <p>
                        <label for="message">Message:</label><br>
                        <input type="text" id="message" name="message" placeholder="Write your message">
                    </p>

                    <button type="submit">Send</button>
                </form>
            </section>
        </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 Tanmay Gaira. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

Small corrections before you submit

Your assignment text says ui, but in HTML the correct tag is ul. I assumed that was a typo and used ul.

What you should replace

Before submission, update these 3 things:

  1. Photo path

    HTML
    <img src="tanmay-photo.jpg" alt="Photo of Tanmay Gaira" width="180">

    Replace tanmay-photo.jpg with your actual image filename.

  2. LinkedIn link
    Replace:

    HTML
    https://www.linkedin.com/

    with your actual LinkedIn profile URL.

  3. GitHub link
    Replace:

    HTML
    https://github.com/

    with your actual GitHub profile URL.

If you want a better version for marks

I can make Version 2 that looks more teacher-impressive while still using only HTML and no CSS, with:

  • better section structure

  • stronger professional wording

  • cleaner project descriptions

  • proper academic formatting

  • a more polished resume layout for submission

If you want that, send “make version 2”.


You said:

This is the blueprint. Don't add image. Add make like this. Only use HTML and the tags.

ChatGPT said:

Understood. You want the resume layout to follow the blueprint style:

  • same left sidebar + right content structure

  • no image

  • HTML only

  • no CSS

  • use semantic tags and the required HTML tags

  • avoid div and span completely

Below is a blueprint-style HTML resume structure that mimics that layout as closely as possible using only HTML tags.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Tanmay Gaira Resume</title>
</head>
<body>

    <header>
        <hgroup>
            <h1>Tanmay Gaira</h1>
            <h2>Web Developer | Graphic Designer | Freelance Photographer</h2>
        </hgroup>

        <nav>
            <ul>
                <li><a href="#profile">Profile</a></li>
                <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
                <li><a href="#skills">Technical Skills</a></li>
                <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
                <li><a href="#hobbies">Hobbies</a></li>
                <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
            </ul>
        </nav>
        <hr>
    </header>

    <main>
        <table border="1" width="100%" cellpadding="12">
            <tr>

                <!-- LEFT SIDEBAR -->
                <td width="30%" valign="top">

                    <aside>
                        <section id="contact">
                            <h2>CONTACT</h2>
                            <article>
                                <p><strong>Location:</strong><br>Haldwani, Uttarakhand, India</p>
                                <p><strong>Phone:</strong><br><a href="tel:7217796730">7217796730</a></p>
                                <p><strong>Email:</strong><br><a href="mailto:tanmaygaira911@gmail.com">tanmaygaira911@gmail.com</a></p>
                                <p><strong>LinkedIn:</strong><br><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank">LinkedIn Profile</a></p>
                                <p><strong>GitHub:</strong><br><a href="https://github.com/" target="_blank">GitHub Profile</a></p>
                            </article>
                        </section>

                        <hr>

                        <section id="skills">
                            <h2>TECHNICAL SKILLS</h2>

                            <article>
                                <h3>Software & Development</h3>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>HTML</li>
                                    <li>C Programming</li>
                                    <li>C++ Basics</li>
                                    <li>Web Development</li>
                                </ul>
                            </article>

                            <article>
                                <h3>Design & Editing</h3>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>Adobe Lightroom</li>
                                    <li>Canva</li>
                                    <li>Graphic Designing</li>
                                    <li>Video Editing</li>
                                </ul>
                            </article>

                            <article>
                                <h3>Creative Skills</h3>
                                <ul>
                                    <li>Photography</li>
                                    <li>Content Creation</li>
                                    <li>Creative Editing</li>
                                </ul>
                            </article>
                        </section>

                        <hr>

                        <section>
                            <h2>LANGUAGES</h2>
                            <table border="1" width="100%" cellpadding="6">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Language</th>
                                    <th>Level</th>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td>Hindi</td>
                                    <td>Native</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td>English</td>
                                    <td>Professional</td>
                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </section>

                        <hr>

                        <section>
                            <h2>HOBBIES</h2>
                            <ol>
                                <li>Photography</li>
                                <li>Video Editing</li>
                                <li>Learning New Technologies</li>
                                <li>Watching coding content</li>
                                <li>Design exploration</li>
                            </ol>
                        </section>
                    </aside>

                </td>

                <!-- RIGHT MAIN CONTENT -->
                <td width="70%" valign="top">

                    <section id="profile">
                        <h2>PROFILE</h2>
                        <article>
                            <p>
                                I am Tanmay Gaira, a BCA student with interests in web development,
                                graphics design, freelance photography, and creative digital work.
                                I enjoy building practical projects, learning new technologies,
                                and combining technical and creative skills to create useful and
                                visually engaging solutions.
                            </p>
                        </article>
                    </section>

                    <hr>

                    <section id="education">
                        <h2>EDUCATION</h2>
                        <article>
                            <table border="1" width="100%" cellpadding="8">
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Qualification</th>
                                    <th>Institution</th>
                                    <th>Year</th>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td>BCA</td>
                                    <td>Amrapali University</td>
                                    <td>Pursuing</td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td>12th</td>
                                    <td>Inter College Kameri Devi</td>
                                    <td>2024</td>
                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </article>
                    </section>

                    <hr>

                    <section id="projects">
                        <h2>PROJECTS</h2>

                        <article>
                            <h3>Portfolio Website</h3>
                            <p>
                                Developed a personal portfolio website using HTML and CSS to showcase
                                my profile, projects, and skills.
                            </p>
                        </article>

                        <article>
                            <h3>CGPA Calculator</h3>
                            <p>
                                Built a CGPA calculator to solve grade calculation problems for college students.
                            </p>
                        </article>

                        <article>
                            <h3>Rentify</h3>
                            <p>
                                Planned a rental and room listing platform project named Rentify for room
                                and property-related services.
                            </p>
                        </article>

                        <details>
                            <summary>More about my projects</summary>
                            <p>
                                I am also interested in educational tools, coding-based projects,
                                and practical web solutions for students and businesses.
                            </p>
                        </details>
                    </section>

                    <hr>

                    <section>
                        <h2>ACHIEVEMENTS</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li>Built multiple web and creative projects during BCA learning journey.</li>
                            <li>Worked on photography, editing, and digital design-related tasks.</li>
                            <li>Created useful student-focused tools such as a CGPA calculator.</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>

                    <hr>

                    <section>
                        <h2>CAREER OBJECTIVE</h2>
                        <article>
                            <p>
                                My goal is to become a strong software and web professional while also
                                growing in design, editing, and content creation. I want to build
                                meaningful digital products and continuously improve my technical expertise.
                            </p>
                        </article>
                    </section>

                    <hr>

                    <section>
                        <h2>QUICK MESSAGE</h2>
                        <form>
                            <p>
                                <label for="name">Name</label><br>
                                <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Enter your name">
                            </p>

                            <p>
                                <label for="email">Email</label><br>
                                <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="Enter your email">
                            </p>

                            <p>
                                <label for="message">Message</label><br>
                                <input type="text" id="message" name="message" placeholder="Write your message">
                            </p>

                            <button type="submit">Send</button>
                        </form>
                    </section>

                </td>
            </tr>
        </table>
    </main>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; 2026 Tanmay Gaira | Resume</p>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

Important note

Because you said “make like this” and “only use HTML and tags”, I copied the structure idea of the blueprint:

  • left sidebar → contact, skills, languages, hobbies

  • right main section → profile, education, projects, achievements, objective

But without CSS, HTML alone cannot fully reproduce the exact visual styling (dark sidebar, spacing, alignment, typography, gold lines, etc.). It can only reproduce the layout structure and section arrangement.

One correction

In your assignment earlier, the required tag list said ui. That is not an HTML tag. It should be ul. I used ul.

If you want the blueprint to look much closer

I can now make Version 2 with these improvements while still using only HTML:

  • name at top right like the sample

  • sidebar sections in the exact order of the blueprint

  • work experience section styled like the sample using only headings/lists/tables

  • much more professional resume content

  • cleaner spacing structure for submission

If you want that, send:

“make exact blueprint version in HTML only”


ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
